problem id: 14a30d8f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01111101 -> 01001111
  01011100 -> 00001011
  10110000 -> 00010110
  11010111 -> 11011010
  10000111 -> 11010000
  10010110 -> 10010010
  11110001 -> 01011110
  00001000 -> 00000001
  01001010 -> 10001001

query: 11101100
predicted answer: 00011101
